description_long: This is a classic bentwood chair, reminiscent of the iconic Thonet design, featuring a round seat and elegantly curved backrest made from dark-stained wood. The seat appears to be solid with a subtle dotted or perforated pattern, providing both comfort and visual interest. The backrest is formed by two concentric, smoothly bent wooden rods, offering ergonomic support without armrests. The chair stands on four slender, slightly splayed legs, each crafted from the same dark wood, contributing to its lightweight yet sturdy appearance. The overall construction suggests a combination of traditional craftsmanship and durability, making it suitable for cafes, bistros, or urban public spaces. Its timeless design and compact form allow it to blend seamlessly into a variety of urban environments.
description: A dark wood bentwood chair with a round, subtly patterned seat and a curved, open backrest. It has four slender legs and no armrests, evoking a classic, elegant style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round seat, open curved backrest, and two front legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the curved backrest and the splayed rear leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the double-looped backrest and the alignment of the rear legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the seat's thickness and the curvature of the backrest.
